# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Unlock the full tcc course catalog and discover thousands of options tailored for you. Browse smarter, plan better, and take action today with my-project.

### Features
https://example.com/features
Dive into cutting-edge features built around the ccac course catalog experience. Filter, compare, and organize mail order catalogues with ease — all in one powerful platform.

### About
https://example.com/about
Learn how my-project was built to simplify the tcc course catalog search for every learner. Our mission drives smarter access to catalogs and better educational outcomes for all.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions about the ccac course catalog or mail order catalogues? Reach our team now and get personalized guidance to find exactly what you need through my-project.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - my-project

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - my-project

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - my-project

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.
